description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named publish that dispatches on a workflow input for a tag name. The workflow has multiple jobs for different platforms (android, android_qjs, ios, ios_qjs, osx, osx_node, osx_qjs, windows, windows_node, windows_qjs, linux64) to download artifacts, install dependencies, build, and upload artifacts. A final publish job depends on all previous jobs, creates a release with version information from source code, and uploads release assets.
